2744.reason: [This call to parseLVal() will consume tokens and may throw exceptions or produce incorrect state when the identifier is not actually an LVal (e.g., when it's a function call). The method assumes any IDENFR can be parsed as LVal, but doesn't validate if it's followed by '[' or '=' properly.]

2759.reason: [The judgeLVal() method has flawed logic - it attempts to parse as LVal first without checking if the next token makes it a valid assignment context. This causes incorrect parsing when identifiers are used in function calls or other contexts.]
